label: Lifeskills
blurb: The free always-on essentials. The 12 Skilskis that quietly handle the unglamorous mechanics of work + life — receipts, inboxes, calendars, meetings, formatting, translation. Burned-in defaults; no setup.

skills.label: Receipt to Ledger
skills.method: OCRs mobile photos of receipts, extracts tax info, maps to a chart of accounts.

skills.label: Inbox Triage & Routing
skills.method: Scans incoming email, tags by urgency, surfaces high-priority threads.

skills.label: Calendar Tetris Negotiator
skills.method: Reads email threads, cross-references calendars, proposes meeting slots.

skills.label: Meeting Action Items
skills.method: Parses transcripts, extracts assigned tasks with owner + deadline.

skills.label: Document Formatter
skills.method: Takes raw text, applies clean Word/Google Doc structure, fixes inconsistent styling.

skills.label: Translate & Reply
skills.method: Detects foreign emails, translates accurately preserving business intent, drafts reply in source language.

skills.label: PDF Form Autofiller
skills.method: Extracts structured data from a profile/CRM and maps it to rigid government/vendor PDFs.
trigger_examples: I need to submit this paperwork

skills.label: Benefits FAQ
skills.method: Reads long benefit/insurance/HR PDFs and answers plain-English questions.

skills.label: Travel Itinerary Drafter
skills.method: Reads stated preferences, drafts an itinerary, formats it into the user's calendar.

skills.label: Vendor Invoice Approver
skills.method: Compares incoming PDF invoices against original POs and receiving logs to flag mismatches.

skills.label: Syllabus to Calendar
skills.method: Reads class syllabi or training plans and emits a calendar with assignments + due dates.

skills.label: Time Tracking Aggregator
skills.method: Scans the user's commits, sent emails, and calendar to auto-fill end-of-week timesheets.
